grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to operate single salon at designated address
grant_and_term.initial_term: Generally 5 years, coinciding with lease term if party tenant
grant_and_term.renewal: Not automatic; possible 2-5 year successor term; must sign then-current FA with potentially materially different terms

monthly_fee.includes: Franchise fee + base rent + rental tax

fees_and_payments.liquidated_damages: All remaining Monthly Fees through end of term, discounted to PV
fees_and_payments.holdover_no_consent: 300% of Monthly Fee + all legal costs

site_selection_construction.party_tenant: Franchisor attempts to lease from Walmart/big box retailer; subleases to franchisee
site_selection_construction.non_party_tenant: Franchisee finds site; franchisor must approve; landlord must sign rider granting franchisor assignment rights
site_selection_construction.minimum_size: 800 sq ft recommended; franchisor reserves right to reject <800
site_selection_construction.lease_term_limits: No shorter than 3 years, no longer than 5 years (non-party tenant)
site_selection_construction.buildout: Arranged by franchisor through approved contractor
site_selection_construction.time_to_open: 1-2 years average from signing to grand opening

training_obligations.initial: 3-day mandatory program at Baton Rouge, LA — franchisee + manager
training_obligations.timing: Must complete before Grand Opening, at least 8 weeks prior
training_obligations.retraining: Required after 2 insurance claims in 3 years within 90 days
training_obligations.transferee: Must complete training before transfer approved

operational_obligations.personal_operation: Not required but must inspect weekly if not operating; hire licensed on-premises manager
operational_obligations.manager_requirements: Licensed by state; complete training; sign noncompete/confidentiality; no interest in competitor within 5 miles
operational_obligations.com_compliance: Must comply with COM as modified from time to time
operational_obligations.operating_hours: Must operate during prescribed hours (per COM and landlord)
operational_obligations.maintenance: Must maintain salon 'as new'; repair at own cost
operational_obligations.reporting: Monthly gross sales reports; I-9s; personnel records; 36-month retention
operational_obligations.insurance: Must maintain CGL/PL through approved group carrier; grant limited POA for insurance
operational_obligations.remodeling: Must remodel to then-current standards on renewal; relocation at sole cost ($25K-$50K WM)

termination_triggers.without_cause: FA auto-terminates if lease terminated; Walmart can terminate lease on 90 days notice without cause
non_curable_immediate: Failure to pay within 14 days of written demand

conditions: Sign bill of sale and assignment
transfer_restrictions.death_disability: Transfer within 6 months; no fee; transferee must qualify

default_cross_default.lease_cross_default: Default on lease = default on FA if party tenant
default_cross_default.multi_location: Obligations under 'any agreements or arrangements with us' must be satisfied

noncompete.during_term: No similar business in territory or within 5-mile radius
noncompete.post_term: Same restriction for 1 year after expiration/termination/transfer
noncompete.entity_owners: All entity owners must sign FA and noncompete

guaranty_scope.personal_guaranty: Each individual owning interest in franchised entity must sign FA and assume all obligations
guaranty_scope.unlimited: Franchisee personally liable for all obligations including liquidated damages

dispute_resolution.method: Litigation only (no arbitration or mediation except for specific claims per Section 35)
dispute_resolution.damages_limitation: Types and amounts limited; period to bring claims limited
state_overrides: IL: IL law governs, IL venue
ND: ND law, ND venue, jury/punitive waivers deleted
MD: franchisee may sue in MD for MD law claims

indemnification.franchisee_to_franchisor: Must indemnify for all costs/damages from claims relating to salon operation or FA failure
indemnification.walmart_indemnification: Must indemnify Walmart for damages from franchisee acts/employees/operations

force_majeure.quality_assurance_visits: May be suspended during force majeure or conditions outside franchisor's control
force_majeure.training: May be suspended altogether during force majeure; franchisee must attend next available session when resumed

distinctive_clauses.white_box_return: Must return salon in 'broom clean' and 'white box' condition; $25,000 fee if not
distinctive_clauses.abandoned_property: Any property left in salon after termination/expiration deemed abandoned; franchisor may dispose at will without compensation
distinctive_clauses.telephone_assignment: Must assign phone, fax, websites, social media, d/b/a, yellow pages to franchisor on termination
distinctive_clauses.data_access: Must grant franchisor unlimited independent access to all merchant services/POS data at all times
distinctive_clauses.performance_covenant: Walmart reserves right to terminate lease if performance covenant not met — covenant specifics not in FDD body
distinctive_clauses.walmart_no_cause_90_days: Walmart can terminate any individual lease on 90 days notice without cause
distinctive_clauses.inflation_guard: Section 17 of FA provides for inflation adjustment mechanism
